title: One Less Rope
body:
this resource pack renames the [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) rope & rope fences to _'netting, net fences'_  in order to not clash with the million other ropes in the mod market!

it currently only works with the **English (US)** and **Español (México)** languages.

[IK THEY ADDED ROPE FENCES GIMME A SEC SIS]
